meta.question: Based on the models of this organization, is there a sole profile of the organization? (Organization ID: 67e70970f0404a7e87122700ad26d87b)
meta.finalAnswer:
No, there is not a sole profile for organization Org35 (ID: 67e70970f0404a7e87122700ad26d87b). This organization has 13 different BPMN models, including:

1. event-basedChoreography
2. testCH
3. CHExclusiveSSSR(swapped)
4. incidentManagement (2)
5. coffeeChoreography
6. choreographyPoliniXor
7. CHEventBaseSSSR
8. same receiver (EVENT)
9. Choreography-event-base
10. New Process
11. choreographyPAR(one) 2 sender
12. Bike rental spezzato
13. choreographyPAR

The organization clearly has multiple profiles rather than a single/sole profile.
